title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Best Workout Headphones (2026), Tested in the Gym and in the Streets
items.description: Rock your inner jock with a pair of sturdy, sweatproof, and tangle-proof headphones. Here are our favorites.

items.title: Zeno raises $25M to speed up production of its battery-swap motorbikes
items.description: The startup, co-founded by Tesla and Apple alumni, has sold nearly 1,000 of its motorbikes so far.

items.title: Best Gravel Running Shoes (2026): Salomon, Adidas, Nike
items.description: The best new shoes in this hybrid, niche footwear style can take you from your front door, down the asphalt, and into the trees.

items.title: Science Corp raises $230M as it races to bring its brain implant to market
items.description: A source close to the company says the round assigns Science a post-money valuation of $1.25 billion.

items.title: Rivian is betting its future on one of the fastest EV launches in US history
items.description: If Rivian reaches its R2 sales target in 2026, it will be one of the fastest ramp-ups ever of a new EV in the United States.

items.title: Suunto Vertical 2 Review: Catching Up to the Pack
items.description: Suunto's latest adventure fitness tracker finally introduces a bright AMOLED screen that's great for maps.

items.title: KEF Muo Bluetooth Speaker: Portable Hi-Fi
